events.label: reasoning
events.text:
{
  "decision": "fail",
  "risk": "high",
  "work_stage": "rough-complete",
  "component_conditions": ["installed-defective", "non-compliant"],
  "percent_complete": 85,
  "value": 0,
  "sound_source": "",
  "confidence": 0.95,
  "event_time": 0.0,
  "rate": 0.0,
  "order": [],
  "workable": [],
  "findings": [
    "Missing drip loop at service entrance conductors",
    "Potential water ingress into service equipment",
    "Non-compliant with NEC 230.54(F) requiring drip loops for service entrance conductors"
  ],
  "actions": [
    "Form drip loop in service entrance conductors before point of attachment",
    "Ensure conductors extend below service head entry to prevent water tracking",
    "Re-inspect after correction"
  ],
  "rationale": "A missing drip loop at the service entrance allows water to run along the conductors into the service equipment, creating a shock and fire hazard. NEC 230.54(F) explicitly requires drip loops for overhead service conductors. This is a rough-complete stage defect that must be corrected before final inspection.",
  "references": ["NEC 230.54(F)"]
}
